Frontera Energy (TSX: FEC) to share Q4 2024 financials, year-end reserves, and operational update, in upcoming conference call.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on February 20, 2025, Frontera Energy Corporation (TSX: FEC) disclosed plans to unveil its financial and operational outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024, along with the Company's reserves by the end of 2024.

news.headline: Burnham Holdings, Inc. reports record 2024 results with all-time highs in net sales, net income, and earnings per share.
news.summary: Burnham Holdings, Inc. based in Lancaster, Pa., shared its financial outcomes for Q4 and full year of 2024. The company, traded as BURCA on OTC-Pink, achieved record-breaking figures in net sales, net income, and earnings per share during this period. The results indicate significant growth and prosperity for BHI as they surpassed previous records in key financial metrics.

news.headline: Fosun partners with Abu Dhabi Investment Office, enhancing Middle East strategy at Abu Dhabi Investment Forum in Shanghai.
news.summary: In a significant development on February 20, 2025, Fosun International's global activities reached a new height. The event took place in Shanghai at the Abu Dhabi Investment Forum, where Fosun International inked a Memorandum of Strategic Cooperation with the Abu Dhabi Investment Office (ADIO). This deal highlights the strengthening ties between the two entities and underscores Fosun's commitment to expansion and collaboration.

Spark Design Organization announces 94 winners for Platinum, Gold, Silver, Bronze awards. Open call for 2025 entries.
news.summary: The prestigious Spark Design Organization is currently accepting submissions from global participants to vie for the highly sought-after Platinum, Gold, Silver, and Bronze Spark Awards. Esteemed judges will select winners from a wide array of design categories. Recently, in New York on February 20, 2025, a total of 94 exceptional designs have been recognized as award recipients.

news.headline: Akeso enrolled first patient in Phase III trial of ivonescimab + chemo for triple-negative breast cancer.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Hong Kong, Akeso, Inc. (9926.HK) revealed that it has achieved a significant milestone by enrolling the initial patient in its Phase III clinical trial. This trial involves testing ivonescimab alongside chemotherapy in a multicenter, randomized, double-blind study. This marks a crucial step forward in the Company's research and development efforts.

news.headline: Liquid Web adds 4 new server locations in San Jose, Ashburn, Sydney, and London for improved hosting.
news.summary: Liquid Web, a prominent provider of dedicated servers, WordPress, VPS, GPU, and cloud hosting solutions, recently announced the establishment of four additional bare metal server sites. These new locations are based in San Jose, California; Ashburn, Virginia; Sydney, Australia; and London, England. This strategic expansion initiative serves to enhance global reach and strengthens Liquid Web's presence in key markets, offering customers improved access and performance.

news.headline: CoreCivic reports Q4 revenue of $479.3M, exceeding estimates, with FFO of 39 cents per share. Analyst sets price forecast at $28, sees revenue opportunities in 2026.
news.summary: JonesResearch analyst Jason Weaver has maintained a bullish outlook on CoreCivic, Inc. (NYSE:CXW) with a reiterated Buy rating and a price target set at $28 per share. After the company's fourth-quarter results were released, CoreCivic reported a revenue of $479.3 million, surpassing analyst expectations of $465.17 million. The company also exceeded analyst forecasts for funds from operations (FFO) with 39 cents per share compared to the estimated 34 cents per share. Looking ahead to the fiscal year 2025, CoreCivic anticipates a net income ranging from $53.5 million to $67.5 million and a full-year FFO between $1.37 and $1.50 per share. For more details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Northern Oil And Gas forecasts 2025 production at 130.0-135.0 MBoe per day despite Q4 setbacks.CEO remains optimistic.
news.summary: Northern Oil and Gas, Inc. (NYSE:NOG) revealed details of their operations in the fourth quarter of 2024 and offered guidance for 2025. They anticipate daily production in Q4 to be around 131.0–132.0 thousand barrels of oil equivalent (MBoe), which falls towards the higher end of their yearly production forecast. The company invested $27 million in elective Ground Game activities and leasehold acquisitions during the quarter. They estimate capital expenditures for Q4 to range from $231 million to $232 million, excluding any unplanned transactions. Despite challenges that affected production towards the end of 2024 and the start of 2025, CEO Nick O’Grady remains positive about the company's prospects. Looking ahead to 2025, Northern Oil and Gas projects daily production to be between 130.0–135.0 MBoe.

news.headline: Asbury Automotive buys Herb Chambers for $1.34B, including 33 dealerships, 52 franchises, and 3 collision centers.
news.summary: Asbury Automotive Group Inc (NYSE: ABG) saw a decline in shares today following the announcement of their agreement to purchase The Herb Chambers Companies for $1.34 billion. The deal includes 33 dealerships, 52 franchises, and three collision centers owned by Herb Chambers, amounting to an estimated $2.9 billion in revenue for 2024. The acquisition is anticipated to be finalized in the latter part of the second quarter of 2025, pending standard conditions, and will be financed through credit facilities, mortgage proceeds, and cash reserves. Herb Chambers, the principal of The Herb Chambers Companies...

news.headline: Eldorado Gold Corporation amends Lamaque Complex Technical Report after review; filed original report on Jan 27, 2025.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 20, 2025, Eldorado Gold Corporation released news about its Lamaque Complex. The company has submitted an updated Technical Report following a review by the British Columbia Securities Commission. The previous report, titled "Technical Report - Lamaque Complex, Québec, Canada,” was filed on January 27, 2025, with an effective date of December 31, 2024. This updated report, known as the “Amended Technical Report,” reflects changes and updates after the review process. Eldorado Gold Corporation continues to operate and provide essential information to stakeholders through these filings.

news.headline: VIZpin, Inc. introduces Entegrity Deadbolt as an affordable, secure smart lock to their Access Control Solutions.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Lancaster, Pennsylvania, VIZpin, Inc. unveiled the latest addition to its Entegrity Smart line of Visitor Management and Access Control Solutions - the Entegrity Deadbolt. This new product was introduced in response to increasing customer requests for a cost-effective and reliable smart lock option. By expanding its product range, VIZpin aims to meet the growing needs of consumers seeking advanced security solutions.

Lundin Gold had record annual production of 502,029 oz of gold at an AISC of $875/oz in 2024, generating $662M cash flow and $540M adjusted free cash flow. Revenue hit $1.19B from selling 495,374 oz at an average $2,462/oz. Net income was $426M and EBITDA was $780M. Lundin Gold is debt-free and increased quarterly dividend to $0.30 per share with strong exploration potential and highest mineral reserves at FDN site.
news.summary: Lundin Gold Inc. reported record-breaking results for the fourth quarter and year ended December 31, 2024. The company achieved annual gold production of 502,029 ounces at an all-in sustaining cost of $875 per ounce, exceeding its production and cost guidance. This led to record revenues of $1,193 million from the sale of 495,374 ounces at an average realized gold price of $2,462 per ounce. The company also generated cash flow of $662 million from operating activities and adjusted free cash flow of $540 million. Lundin Gold became debt-free in 2024 and increased its quarterly dividend to $0.30 per share. The company's exploration program resulted in the highest published Mineral Reserves and Resources, showcasing the potential of its operations. Lundin Gold anticipates generating significant free cash flow in excess of $500 million in 2025. Key financial metrics include adjusted EBITDA of $780 million and adjusted net earnings of $421.6 million for the year. Lundin Gold's average mill throughput was 4,620 tonnes per day, with an average head grade of 10.5 grams per tonne and an average recovery rate of 87.8% for the year. Net revenues for the year were $1.19 billion, and cash operating costs and all-in sustaining costs were $712 and $875 per ounce sold, respectively. The company's CEO highlighted operational excellence and the completion of the Process Plant Expansion Project as key drivers of its success. Lundin Gold is poised for further growth and shareholder returns in the future.

news.headline: Granholm, Biden's Energy Secretary, joins board of large US utility company.
dLocal denies short-seller claims, reaffirms independent investigations. Allegations misleading. Stock Nasdaq: DLO. Tech payments platform.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Montevideo, Uruguay, dLocal Limited (Nasdaq: DLO), a prominent tech-oriented payments platform, rejected claims from a recent short-seller report as inaccurate and misleading. The report was allegedly orchestrated by parties looking to benefit from the company's stock decline. dLocal specializes in facilitating connections between global enterprise merchants and numerous consumers in developing markets worldwide.

news.headline: Orbia reported $222 million in Q4 2024 EBITDA and $1,097 million for full year. Adjusted Q4 EBITDA was $273 million.
news.summary: Mexico City-based Orbia Advance Corporation, S.A.B. de C.V. (BMV: ORBIA*) announced its unaudited financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company reported EBITDA of $222 million for Q4 2024 and $1,097 million for the full year. Adjusted EBITDA for Q4 stood at $273 million, totaling $1,189 million for the full year after considering one-time legal and restructuring expenses. This adjusted figure better represents the company's financial performance.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 20, 2025, Madison Pacific Properties Inc. disclosed the outcomes of the Annual General Meeting of shareholders. The meeting took place in Vancouver and involved voting on important company matters.

Rivian beats earnings expectations with regulatory credits, announces milestone 1 billion Amazon deliveries.
news.summary: Rivian recently released its earnings report, revealing losses that were not as severe as anticipated, thanks to regulatory credits. The electric vehicle company, often regarded as a competitor to Tesla, also announced significant progress with milestone package deliveries. Additionally, Rivian's stock experienced fluctuations following the earnings beat news, amidst reports of delivering over 1 billion packages for Amazon.

Stocks plummet as Walmart issues warning and big banks decline. Get detailed analysis on Bloomberg: The Close 02/20/2025.

The financial news was reported by Bloomberg in their segment titled "The Close." The market experienced a notable downward trend in response to Walmart's cautionary signal, alongside banking institutions encountering noteworthy losses.

Royal Caribbean Group starts $1.0 billion share repurchase program, already bought $100 million in shares.
news.summary: In Miami on February 20, 2025, Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) revealed the commencement of share repurchases as part of a $1.0 billion share repurchase program unveiled the previous week. Currently, $100 million worth of shares have been acquired through open market transactions. The company's latest efforts in this initiative signify a significant investment towards enhancing shareholder value.

news.headline: New transit maps and signs unveiled in Santa Rosa with test installations at the downtown transit mall and SMART station. Agencies and MTC collaborate for improved navigation. SAN FRANCISCO, Feb. 20, 2025.
news.summary: New signage and maps have been recently set up at the Downtown Transit Mall and SMART Station in San Francisco. The installation took place on Feb. 20, 2025, by Bay Area transit agencies and the Metropolitan Transportation Commission (MTC) at the Santa Rosa Transit Mall and Santa Rosa Downtown Sonoma-Marin Area Rail Transit. This initiative aims to enhance commuter experience in the area and assist in navigating the transit system efficiently. The updated signs and maps are expected to benefit the significant number of daily commuters and tourists who utilize these transportation facilities.

news.headline: Ecolab declares a $0.65 quarterly cash dividend, to be paid on April 15, 2025, to shareholders of record by March 18, 2025.
news.summary: The directors of Ecolab Inc. announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.65 per common share, with payment scheduled for April 15, 2025. Shareholders as of March 18, 2025, will be eligible for this dividend. Ecolab, trading as NYSE:ECL, has a history of 88 years of issuing cash dividends on its common stock. Ecolab is a global leader in sustainability, providing water, hygiene, and infection prevention solutions to millions of clients worldwide.

Franklin Templeton debuts EZPZ ETF on Cboe BZX, providing investors with weighted exposure to Bitcoin and Ethereum.
news.summary: The latest crypto offering from Franklin Templeton, now available on the Cboe BZX exchange, provides investors with access to both Bitcoin and Ethereum.

news.headline: Prologis Board of Directors raises dividend by 5% to $4.04 per share on March 31, 2025. NYSE: PLD.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in San Francisco, the Board of Directors of Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD) announced a 5% increase in the company's yearly dividend to $4.04 per common stock share. This decision was made during their meeting where they also approved the regular cash dividend for the quarter ending March 31, 2025.

news.headline: CNOOC Limited starts production at Luda 5-2 North Oilfield Phase II Development Project in central area.
news.summary: CNOOC Limited, a company listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under the ticker symbols SEHK: 00883 (HKD Counter) and 80883 (RMB Counter), as well as on the Shanghai Stock Exchange under the ticker SSE: 600938, has recently started production at the Luda 5-2 North Oilfield Phase II Development Project in Hong Kong on February 20, 2025. The project, situated in the central region, marks a significant milestone for the company.

news.headline: US to face shortage of 8,650 cardiologists by 2037, per Medicus Healthcare Solutions report, raising access concerns.
news.summary: In Windham, New Hampshire, on February 20, 2025, it was reported that the United States is anticipated to experience a deficit of around 8,650 cardiologists by the year 2037. This shortage poses significant issues regarding the accessibility of cardiovascular medical services. In response to this escalating workforce dilemma, Medicus Healthcare aims to assist healthcare professionals in finding viable solutions.

news.headline: ARS Pharma's neffy (Epinephrine Nasal Spray) now on 30 formularies, reaching half of patients managing Type 1 allergic reactions.
news.summary: After being launched roughly five months ago, neffy has been added to three more formularies. This move has broadened access for half of the patients and caregivers handling Type 1 allergic reactions. neffy is now covered by a total of 30 formulary platforms.

HanesBrands replaces existing $300M loan with senior secured term loan B of $1.1B, maturing in 7 years at SOFR + 275bp.
news.summary: In Winston-Salem, North Carolina, HanesBrands revealed the pricing of its new senior secured term loan B facility. The loan is valued at $1.1 billion, aiming to supplant the current $300 million Term Loan B expiring in 2030. The Term Loan B is slated to mature seven years post the closing, anticipated in the upcoming weeks. It was priced at SOFR + 275 basis points with an OID of 9.

news.headline: Boardable expands to Fishers, IN with new office, showing commitment to local community; global headquarters established.
news.summary: Boardable, a renowned nonprofit board management software company, has recently unveiled its latest achievement with the establishment of a new office in Fishers, Indiana on February 20, 2025. This move underscores the company's strong dedication to its community, showcasing their commitment to growth and development. This strategic decision will not only enhance the company's presence locally but also contribute to the economic landscape of Fishers. Overall, this expansion marks a significant progression for Boardable as it continues to make strides in its mission.
